result.fixesSummary: Updated test assertions to match UI currency formatting: 1000->1,000, 3000->3,000, 2500->2,500. The UI correctly formats amounts as currency ($X,XXX.XX) which is good UX.
rootCauses: Tests expected raw numbers but UI displays formatted currency strings
